name: Yoichi Bow
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Barrage" (customRuntime, Barrage.cs) — REWORKED 2026-06-10 after live debugging (v1's recId=jobId was wrong; it injected an empty record + a stray roster bit, both cleaned): at +3 the wielder gains the Barrage command (ability 358). LIVE-PROVEN mappings: roster job band 74-92 = PSX wheel order; rec = job-69 (Archer 77 -> rec 8, menu-verified); learned jobIdx = job-74 (Chemist High-Ether purchase diff); extend bits MSB-first PER BYTE, byte0=slots 1-8 / byte1=slots 9-16 (slot 10 = 0x4000; barrage_probe's old whole-u16 'msb' rendered 358 as Aurablast — probe fixed too). Learned bit HELD per tick, never cleared (menu purchases stale-writeback-wipe external bits — proven by diff). Ticked in AND out of battle. NAME SHIPPED: ability.en.nxd cell-merge (Name/Desc/IconId only — patch_ability_names.py self-verifies exactly 3 cells differ from vanilla; modloader merges cell-level, so no conflict with GenericJobs). KNOWN GAP: story-unique jobs (Mettle/Aimed Shot), Mime, monsters, Dark Knight unmapped -> log + no grant. RESOLVED 2026-06-10: the Archer cast no-op = the AIM EXECUTOR id-whitelists its own tier rows (406-413) in CODE — a foreign id renders its label + a positional basic-attack preview, then silently drops at confirm (proven with 358/102 Aurablast/146 Focus across slots 1/9/10/11 on two units; full memory scan found no writable tier table). Special-executor jobs EXCLUDED from the grant: Chemist(Items)/Archer(Aim)/Dragoon(Jump)/Ninja(Throw)/Arithmetician(Arithmeticks) — yes, the bow class can't host the bow signature; the engine's joke, not ours. FINAL DESIGN (2026-06-10, curator call): Barrage is THIEF-ONLY — IsEligibleWielder gates the grant to job 83 (Thief's primary IS Steal/rec14, the one host proven to render+cast end-to-end). Card states it: header '+3 Ability — Barrage (Thief Only)'. The true standalone 4th command row was chased exhaustively (built a working Denuvo-safe inline hook on the battle-unit constructor 0x140280884; mapped the struct: primary cmd page +0x5E, secondary +0x60, passives +0x62/64/66) and WALLED: the battle struct has only 2 command-page fields, and the menu's row-count/dispatch decision logic lives in the Denuvo-ENCRYPTED region (0x14D... read of secondary cmd) — unhookable. Secondary-routing for special-executor jobs DROPPED in favor of the clean Thief-only promise. VERIFIED LIVE under Thief. p3Desc: 'A Thief wielder gains the Barrage command: a volley of four swift arrows.'
